feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: DIfference PA0105-SUBTY and PA0105-USRTY
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I'm really try to wrap my head around the two above mentioned fields in table PA0105.

I don't find any different values between the two in our complete dataset and it seems to me that SUBTY is a keyfield of the table whereas USRTY is "simply" an inserted value.

Can anyone perhaps enlighten me as to why these two fields exists in the same table while holding identical values?

entry.title: Introducing Joule: SAP’s AI Copilot for Seamless Business Interactions
entry.content:
Introducing Joule: SAP’s AI Copilot for Seamless Business Interactions

 

SAP is transforming the way businesses interact with their systems with Joule, its AI-powered copilot designed to enhance productivity and simplify tasks. Joule serves as a centralized AI assistant across the SAP ecosystem, providing a seamless and context-aware user experience. 

What Makes Joule Unique?

One AI Copilot for SAP: Joule integrates across SAP cloud solutions like SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, allowing users to interact naturally through language.

Out-of-the-Box & Native Integration: With pre-configured content, Joule is ready to use with minimal setup, making it instantly valuable.

Consistent User Experience: Whether accessed via SAP Start, mobile, or application UIs, Joule ensures a smooth and familiar interaction.

Reliable & Context-Aware: Joule understands user roles, permissions, and the SAP products they use, ensuring relevant responses. 

Responsible & Secure: With strict data protection policies, Joule does not use customer data for AI training or third-party purposes.

 

How Does Joule Help?

  • Provides context-aware responses based on business transactions and data.
  • Maintains cross-application reasoning for efficient navigation across SAP solutions.
  • Leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for document-grounded responses.
  • Ensures data security & compliance by inheriting user authentication rights.
  • Includes ethical AI guardrails to prevent bias, hate speech, and misuse.

By integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) with SAP’s rich business context, Joule enables employees to work 80% more efficiently. It empowers businesses with faster decision-making, streamlined workflows, and enhanced user interactions—truly revolutionizing the SAP experience.

Joule Interaction Patterns is the main starting point.

It branches into four types of interactions:

  • Transactional: Supports CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations.
  • Navigational: Helps users find relevant SAP screens.
  • Informational: Provides knowledge-based answers using SAP Help and Customer Content (Document Grounding).
  • Analytical: Enables data insights through SAP Analytics Cloud and JustAsk.

This flowchart visually simplifies the interaction patterns of Joule. 

Unlocking Business Knowledge with Joule’s Document Grounding

In today’s workplace, quick access to accurate information is crucial. Joule’s Document Grounding feature ensures employees get the right answers based on company-specific documents—without the need for complex AI training or manual searching.

  • What is Document Grounding?

Document Grounding allows businesses to upload important documents—like HR policies, travel guidelines, and FAQs—into Joule. When employees ask a question, Joule retrieves the most relevant information from these documents and delivers a clear, concise response with source citations.

 

  • Why Does This Matter?

Traditional AI models rely on general knowledge, which may not always reflect company-specific policies. Grounding enhances AI by:

✔️ Providing business-specific answers based on internal documentation.

✔️ Citing sources, increasing transparency and trust.

✔️ Reducing misinformation by pulling directly from company-approved materials.

✔️ Eliminating costly AI retraining, as Joule dynamically retrieves the latest content.

 

  • How It Transforms the Employee Experience?

For instance, in SAP SuccessFactors, employees can ask Joule questions about HR policies and receive instant, reliable answers. This saves time, reduces confusion, and enhances productivity—making company knowledge more accessible to everyone.

entry.title: Get documents from TOAHR for specific PERNR
entry.content:
Hi,
We got the task at hand to export every document for a specific personnel number (pernr) from the TOAHR.
The export works fine.
The issue at the moment is to link the personnel number (pernr) to the specific document.
With SAP_OBJECT = PREL it's quite easy since the first eight numbers of the OBJECT_ID are the personnel number (pernr).
But for other SAP_OBJECT values like TAXCERPYDE or else, it doesnt seem like there is a personnel number (pernr) in the OBJECT_ID.

Since I couldn't find any mapping table that will link the pernr to the document id, is there a way to link documents to a personnel number?

entry.title: Missing Infotype IT0709 and IT9901 for Some Employees During SF to SAP HCM Replication
entry.content:
Hi SAP Expert ,

We are experiencing an issue where IT0709 (External Data) and IT9901 (Organizational Assignment) are not created in SAP HCM when certain employee records are replicated from SuccessFactors Employee Central via CPI. This issue does not affect all employees but only a few cases. As a result, these employees have incomplete records, leading to downstream issues in payroll, reporting, and organizational assignments.

What is the best practice for error handling in CPI to prevent incomplete data transfer? Should we implement an Exception Subprocess to retry failed records?

We are using the predefined iFlow:
"Replicate Employee Master Data and Organizational Assignments from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA."

Are there any SAP Notes or best practices specifically for handling missing infotypes due to failed SuccessFactors-to-SAP HCM replication?

Thank you

BR

entry.title: Full and Final Settlement
entry.content:
want to process full and final settlement for an employee on 01.01.2023. please support us to process the settlement.

How can we create F&F

entry.title: Creating a Story report on LTIP
entry.content: Currently I am in the process of recreating a report on LTIP information and I cannot locate where these are in the query builder in a SuccessFactors Story. I have looked in Compensation (Employee Central), under Basic user Information. Just about everywhere and I just cannot find it. I'm hopping that someone here would know. Thank you.

entry.title: Employee Central source of data
entry.content:
Hello 

I am not familiar on SAP Success factor Employee Central, I just want to know where the records in employee central coming from is it connected to SAP ECC/S4HANA database/tables?

entry.title: how to add new fields while change status in tcode - phap_admin
entry.content:
I am using standard Tcode PHAP_ADMIN to Close appraisals related to 'DC Exit' and 'DC Standard'. Now, I would like to add two fields the user and date on which user requested to close. Do we have any screen implementations for this?

In the below navigation, I would like to add new fields, so that it can update same data under 'Changed By' and 'Changed on' fields:

select any row -> Appraisal document -> Change Status -> In this pop-up would like add fields

How to achieve this?

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Where to start as a total newcomer to SAP.
entry.content:
Hello everyone, first of all sorry if I'm posting this somewhere I shouldn't but I really need some guidance here.

Before creating missunderstandings I have to point out I've been through some rough years mentally and I'm just starting to be able to fight with it so I still struggle a bit with being consistent by myself.

That said, I've had a chat with a irl friend working on lindedln, basically told me that S4 Hana HCM is one of the most requested profiles that most enterprises look for, and there's almost no people that studied that so there's even less people that can teach from scratch.

I've been struggling because I can't seem to find a course (free or not idc) that actually teaches me how to work as a HCM SAP consultant, so I've seen tons of youtube videos, tutorials on how to manage positions, workers, pays, days off, role switches, etc etc. But I can't seem to find an official course that can teach me from 0 to "hired" to say it easily, I've seen even other ERP's, I'm a IT technician so I have kind of a base and slightly worked with Databases before, still, Idk whats my entry point, what points to follow and what to exactly study to become a SAP HCM consultant.

I mentioned my mental situtation first because i know there can be people that just decided to smack some youtube tutorials and had the will to learn by themselves in 2 months, but I've been struggling to even find a way to practice, and even worse, a way to prove that I'm capable in that ambit.

Long story short, could anyone please guide me on what to do, what to study, how to test myself and how to eventually make a living out of it? Needed prerequisites/courses/webpages/tutorials/specific things, everything is going to be well received by me!
Thank you truly,
Axel.

entry.title: HR error R11263 : You may not enter any number in the dialog for ID type HCM001
entry.content:
Hi expert:

while i create business partner-person for employee. I got error as "R11263 : You may not enter any number in the dialog for ID type HCM001 "

entry.title: Add district to the payment slip
entry.content:
Previously, we used the "City" field in IT0006 to input district data. After upgrading from ECC to S4 HANA, we have realized that the HK address does not require the "City" field, and we would like to change this to utilize the "District" field instead.

However, we have encountered an issue: when generating the payment slip, the district data does not appear. The current configuration only displays the street, 2nd address line, city, and area. 

Could you please advise on how we can resolve this issue?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Count absences from last year to the current payroll run
entry.content:
I have a complex issue related to absences, i have absence type 0003 and i should count the number of days from this absences from last year to the current payroll,

example : if i run 01.07.2024 to 31.07.2024 , system should count the number of absence days from 01.08.2023 to 31.07.2024

and the next month august 2024 , system should count the days from 01.09.2023 to 31.08.2024 and so on.....

Note: i use negative time 

any support?

entry.title: Logon with language key english_GB
entry.content:
Hi,

how can I logon to sap via sapgui and logon language 6n (english_GB)? 6n is installed, but is not offered in sapgui.

Thank you a lot,

Elena

entry.title: SAP HCM S/4Hana Examination Inquiry
entry.content:
I am trying to access C_THR12_2311 examination for certificate. It's asking me to subscribe for the yearly plan of USD 1,332. 

Is there any cheaper alternative than subscribing for the yearly plan? Thank you.

P.S: I've found two exam chances for $250~ but not available for individuals.

entry.title: Error when trying to push content on OCN
entry.content:
Hello the community,

We have some issues when pushing content to SAP - OData AP using this endpoint POST /learning/odatav4/public/admin/ocn/v1/OcnCourses.

We are receiving this error:

{ "error": { "code": null, "message": "Error adding OCN course - xxxxxxx" } }

  • Where/how can we find more details about the require that we made?

  • Why the request does not show up in API Center - OData API Audit Log?

Thanks,

entry.title: How to calculate difference between two dates in sap time schema
entry.content:
Hi All,

Could you please help me with the below issue?

Vacation accrual amounts are calculated based on the vacation eligibility date indicated in IT0041. However, these amounts are generated every anniversary based on the employee's start date rather than the vacation eligibility date.

For example, if an employee's start date is June 16, 2019, and their vacation eligibility date is November 26, 2003, the expected result is that the vacation quota should be generated on the anniversary of November 26, 2020.

Currently, the system uses a time type to accumulate  days from the start date. In the above example, the system accumulates time from June 16, 2019, resulting in 365 days by June 16, 2020. At that point, the quota is generated, and the time type is reset to 1 to begin counting for the next year.

However, in this scenario, the time type should start accumulating from November 26, 2019. Could you please suggest how to achieve this in the Personnel Calculation Rules (PCR)?

 

Thank you so much for your help in advance!

entry.title: HCM Payroll PCR Attendance Bonus
entry.content:
The client wants to pay an attendance bonus based on the following conditions:

If an employee is present for the entire month – ₹1500.
If an employee takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee takes two days of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month – ₹1500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹1000.
If an employee joins on the second day of the month and takes one day of leave (paid/unpaid) – ₹500.
If an employee joins on the first day of the month and takes more than one day of leave – ₹0.
I have tried handling this through a PCR, but it is not considering employees who joined on the second day of the month.

How can I resolve this issue? Please suggest a solution

entry.title: Deactivation of data sync betwenn SU01 and HR Master Data (PA30) for specific field
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

We'd like to deactivate the sync of the title value in the adress data of SU01 and title value of HR Master Data (PA30).

Currently if we set the title value in HR Master Data of a user to for example Mr. or Miss the value of the title field in the address section of SU01 gets changed as well.
Usually a very useful function but for several reasons not for us.

So is there a way to prevent that the title value in the address data in SU01 of a user gets updated?

Best regards,
Joyce

entry.title: HCM rule
entry.content:
Hello, I am trying to create new professional groups, but when validating this rule I cannot find the meaning of:
                  NUM=D GRPR

I don't know what table D is or if is another value.

Thanks,

entry.title: PU19 Error in Generating PDF
entry.content:
Hello, 

what could be the possible cause of these errors? I already checked the ADS and it its working fine, the forms are also maintained in V_T5UX7

Note: It is working in Prod system but not working in Lower Environments
